providers.no_usage: No usage found in last 30 days.
providers.no_local_scan_yet: No local activity yet — quota from your account
providers.stale_tooltip: Last updated {{age}} ago. Reopen the app to refresh.
providers.error_tooltip: Last sync failed: {{reason}}. Try Refresh quota now or check Settings → Integrations.
providers.force_refresh_tooltip: Run all provider collectors and reload server data without waiting for the next background sync.
providers.synced_ago_tooltip: Time since this provider's row last updated server-side. Refreshes every 30 s while this tab is open.
providers.quota_unavailable: Quota data unavailable — sign in on your phone or pair a Mac.
providers.server_unavailable: Couldn't load plan/quota from the server. Showing local-scan totals only.

sessions.empty: No AI CLI sessions running right now.

alerts.empty_body: Alerts fire when daily / weekly budgets are exceeded or when a single AI CLI process hits a CPU spike. Set your budget in Settings → Budget.

settings.pair_hint: On macOS: open the CLI Pulse menu bar app → Settings → Connection → Set Up Sync, then type the 6-digit code shown there into the field below. Or sign in with email at the top of this section instead.
settings.budget_hint: Alerts fire once per day (or per week) when your CLI spend goes above these limits. Leave blank to disable.
settings.cpu_threshold_help: Alerts when one CLI process exceeds this for one scan.
settings.auto_sync_hint: Auto-sync runs every 2 minutes. Local scan + helper_sync.
settings.last_sync: Last sync {{time}} — {{sessions}} live sessions · {{cost}} over {{files}} files
settings.export_hint: Download the last {{days}} days of scanned usage as a spreadsheet.
settings.updates_hint: Updates are signed. Releases publish at github.com/JasonYeYuhe/cli-pulse-desktop/releases.
settings.unpair_confirm: Unpair this device? You can sign in again later with email, or pair from a Mac.
settings.about_diagnostics_hint: Copy this block when reporting an issue.
settings.about_sentry_test_tooltip: Fires a tagged Info event into Sentry so you can verify the crash-reporting chain is live. Check sentry.io for an event with diagnostic_test=true.

integrations.heading: Integrations
integrations.description: Configure auth tokens for providers that don't use OAuth files. Saved with file-mode 0600 in your config dir.
integrations.storage_file_tooltip: Install gnome-keyring or kwallet on Linux to enable OS keychain storage.
integrations.cursor_cookie_help: Paste from cursor.com browser DevTools → Application → Cookies
integrations.copilot_token_help: From GitHub OAuth or your Copilot CLI's COPILOT_API_TOKEN env
integrations.clear_confirm_body: You'll need to re-paste it from the source. This can't be undone.
integrations.env_override_banner: The environment variable {{var}} is currently overriding this saved value. Remove it from your system to use this setting.

messages.err_budget_nonneg: Daily budget must be a non-negative number.
messages.err_weekly_nonneg: Weekly budget must be a non-negative number.
messages.err_cpu_range: CPU threshold must be between 0 and 100.

signin.heading: Sign in to CLI Pulse
signin.hint: Enter your email — we'll send a verification code. New users sign up automatically.
signin.spam_hint: Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive in a minute.
signin.show_legacy: Have a Mac? Pair from the menu bar instead.

misc.scanning_hint: Scanning ~/.claude and ~/.codex for the past 30 days…
